entries.title: Deployment connection page.
entries.notes: Capture as a user with View:DeploymentConnectionPage. The empty state only shows provider OAuth buttons; seed one active connection when the screenshot should include repository details.
entries.useCase: An operator connects or reviews the Git provider repository used for package install pull requests.

entries.title: Deployment connection widget.
entries.notes: Capture with one active DeploymentConnection when possible; otherwise the widget honestly shows the not-connected state.
entries.useCase: An administrator checks from the dashboard whether package deployment publishing has an active repository connection.
